title: Topbar
description: Application top bar with logo, title, subtitle, nav, search, actions and user slots. Designed to be used inside AppShell or standalone.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Logo and title — the simplest version.

search.title: With search
search.desc: Centered SearchInput with a user Avatar.

actions.title: Actions & user
actions.desc: Typical combo for an authenticated app.

transparent.title: No divider
transparent.desc: No bottom border — useful for integrating with a hero or canvas.

props.title: Visible title next to the logo.
props.subtitle: Secondary text below the title.
props.sticky: Enables position: sticky with translucent background.
props.menuToggle: Shows a hamburger button on the left.
props.menuAriaLabel: Accessible name for the icon-only menu button.

emits.menuToggle: Emitted when the menu button is clicked.

slots.logo: Logo or brand at the start of the bar.
slots.title: Replaces the plain title with rich content.
slots.subtitle: Replaces the plain subtitle with rich content.
slots.user: Avatar / user menu at the end.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the top bar
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by interactive elements inside the topbar (menu, actions, search)
